bakugan.name: Dragonoid
bakugan.description: Dragonoid is a fearless dragon Bakugan who fights with powerful fire abilities. He is the most famous Bakugan in Vestroia and Dan Kuso's loyal partner.

bakugan.name: Delta Dragonoid
bakugan.description: The evolved form of Dragonoid. Delta Dragonoid gained massive power after surviving Naga's attack. His wings became stronger and his fire burns hotter.

bakugan.name: Ultimate Dragonoid
bakugan.description: The ultimate form of Dragonoid, powered by the Infinity Core. He can fly at incredible speeds and his fire can melt anything.

bakugan.name: Infinity Dragonoid
bakugan.description: The most powerful form of Dragonoid, infused with the power of the Infinity Core itself. No Bakugan can withstand his flames.

bakugan.name: Tigrerra
bakugan.description: Tigrerra is a fierce and loyal tiger-like Bakugan who fights for justice. She values friendship and will do anything to protect her partner Runo.

bakugan.name: Blade Tigrerra
bakugan.description: Tigrerra's evolved form with razor-sharp blades covering her body. She became this powerful form to save her partner from Masquerade.

bakugan.name: Skyress
bakugan.description: Skyress is a majestic bird-like Bakugan who commands the winds. She and Shun share a deep bond through their shared love of the sky.

bakugan.name: Storm Skyress
bakugan.description: Skyress evolved into Storm Skyress, becoming a powerful storm spirit. Her wind attacks can now generate cyclones strong enough to destroy mountains.

bakugan.name: Preyas
bakugan.description: Preyas is a witty and playful Bakugan with the unique ability to change attributes. He is Marucho's best friend and constant companion.

bakugan.name: Preyas II
bakugan.description: The evolved Angelo/Diablo form of Preyas. He can split into two separate beings representing light and dark, making him unpredictable in battle.

bakugan.name: Gorem
bakugan.description: Gorem is a massive rock giant Bakugan with incredible strength. Despite his fearsome appearance, he is gentle and kind-hearted, just like his partner Julie.

bakugan.name: Hammer Gorem
bakugan.description: Gorem's evolved form with enormous hammers for fists. His punches can create earthquakes and he became this powerful form to protect Julie.

bakugan.name: Hydranoid
bakugan.description: Hydranoid was once a ruthless Bakugan serving Masquerade. After Alice's kindness, he changed sides and became a powerful ally.

bakugan.name: Dual Hydranoid
bakugan.description: Hydranoid evolved into Dual Hydranoid with two heads, each capable of independent attacks. He grew stronger through the bond with Alice.

bakugan.name: Alpha Hydranoid
bakugan.description: The ultimate three-headed form of Hydranoid. With three heads and immense dark power, Alpha Hydranoid is one of the most feared Bakugan in Vestroia.

bakugan.name: Harpus
bakugan.description: Harpus is a ferocious winged warrior with sharp talons. She is proud and fierce in battle, never backing down from a challenge.

bakugan.name: Fear Ripper
bakugan.description: Fear Ripper is a terrifying Bakugan who served Masquerade. Its razor claws can tear through almost anything, and it relishes causing fear in its opponents.

bakugan.name: Serpenoid
bakugan.description: Serpenoid is a serpentine Bakugan known for its speed and flexibility. Though not the strongest, it makes up for it with agility and cunning.

bakugan.name: Juggernoid
bakugan.description: Juggernoid is a slow but incredibly durable Bakugan. Its shell can deflect most attacks, making it nearly impossible to defeat through brute force.

bakugan.name: El Condor
bakugan.description: El Condor is a swift aerial Bakugan that harnesses the power of wind currents. It can outmaneuver almost any opponent in open sky battles.

bakugan.name: Laserman
bakugan.description: Laserman is a powerful humanoid Bakugan that fires devastating dark energy beams. He fought alongside Klaus against the Brawlers.

bakugan.name: Siege
bakugan.description: Siege is a knightly Aquos Bakugan who fights with honor and discipline. His water-based shield can repel almost any attack.

bakugan.name: Saurus
bakugan.description: Saurus is a dinosaur-like Bakugan with powerful jaws and a thick hide. It relies on raw power rather than speed in battle.

bakugan.name: Rattleoid
bakugan.description: Rattleoid is a snake-like Ventus Bakugan that moves through the air with fluid grace. Its rattle produces ultrasonic waves that confuse opponents.

bakugan.name: Centorrior
bakugan.description: Centorrior is a dragon/centipede hybrid Bakugan with brilliant Haos energy. Chan Lee's prized partner who fought fiercely against the Brawlers.

bakugan.name: Neo Dragonoid
bakugan.description: Neo Dragonoid is Dragonoid reborn with even greater power in New Vestroia. He gained a new form and new abilities to battle the Vexos.

bakugan.name: Cross Dragonoid
bakugan.description: The powerful cross-evolution of Dragonoid. Cross Dragonoid can switch between different battle modes and wields the Element of Fire.

bakugan.name: Brontes
bakugan.description: Brontes is a multi-armed Darkus Bakugan used by Spectra Phantom. His multiple arms each hold a different weapon for devastating combo attacks.

bakugan.name: Helios
bakugan.description: Helios is Spectra Phantom's main Bakugan, a powerful mechanical dragon who scorns weakness. He is proud and ruthless in battle.

bakugan.name: Hyper Dragonoid
bakugan.description: The hyper-evolved form of Dragonoid in Gundalian Invaders. Hyper Dragonoid has reached a level of power that transcends normal evolution.
